official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound system_chat body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns system_chat to packet id 0x79.
The official system_chat body is one trusted Component followed by one boolean overlay field.
The generated fixture uses Component.literal("rustmine system chat") and overlay false only.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded text and overlay values, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove rich Component forms, chat HUD behavior, signed chat behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer rich Component, chat HUD behavior, signed chat behavior, or client-load completion.
